title: Skreeg

'''Skreegs''' were small [[Mammal/Legends|mammalian]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] creatures native to the jungle moon [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. They had short and flat ape-like heads with big eyes and a short snout. They had long [[Limb/Legends|limbs]], and their claws served as their only natural defense. Their body with partially covered with [[Hair/Legends|hair]], the [[Color/Legends|color]] of which ranged from cream to brown.<ref name="SWG" /> Skreegs were herbivorous and lived in small colonies throughout the forests of their homeworld. They were aggressive and considered any approach of other humanoid lifeforms as encroachments on their territory and would fight savagely to defend it.<ref name="SWG:S" />

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Cult of Exar Kun|Exar Kun cultists]] tamed a skreeg named [[Mother Luresh]] that they used to defend the [[Temple of Exar Kun]].<ref name="SWG:EK">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=heroic|Exar Kun}}</ref>
